channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10481] parallel-scale-nfsv3 test racer_on_nfs: racer on NFS client: Hung
item.description:
Result at - https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/c7e2bd8c-fd56-11e7-a6ad-52540065bddc

== parallel-scale-nfsv3 test racer_on_nfs: racer on NFS client ======================================= 21:38:30 (1515533910)

item.environment:
Data on MDT enabled
2.10.56 both clients and servers
2 OSTs 1 mdt
2 clients
Onyx
item.summary: parallel-scale-nfsv3 test racer_on_nfs: racer on NFS client: Hung

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: This issue will be fixed with the patch for LU-10254; https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/30307/ .
